W

WAITING - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.ReservationStatus
Parked on the waiting list because capacity was full.
WaitlistController - Class in client.view
"My Waiting List" screen (visitor-facing): the logged-in visitor's WAITING reservations, fetched via LIST_WAITLIST.
WaitlistController(NetworkService, Session) - Constructor for class client.view.WaitlistController
Creates the waiting-list controller.
WaitlistController.TickTarget - Class in client.view
One offered row's countdown state: where to write, and which Accept to disable at zero.
waitlistDao - Variable in class server.control.ReservationController
Stateless waiting-list DAO collaborator, shared across all client threads.
WaitlistDAO - Class in server.dao
Data access object for the waiting_list_entry table.
WaitlistDAO() - Constructor for class server.dao.WaitlistDAO
Creates the waiting-list DAO.
WaitlistEntryDTO - Class in common.dto
Immutable data transfer object representing a single waiting-list entry — a visitor's queue position for a park/date that was full when they booked.
WaitlistEntryDTO(int, int, String, String, String, int, String, int, long) - Constructor for class common.dto.WaitlistEntryDTO
Creates a fully populated waiting-list entry.
WaitlistGrabExpiryJob - Class in server.scheduler
Sweeps expired waiting-list grab offers.
WaitlistGrabExpiryJob(Consumer<String>) - Constructor for class server.scheduler.WaitlistGrabExpiryJob
Creates the job with a sink for its one-line run summaries.
when(NotificationDTO) - Static method in class client.view.NotificationCenterController
Prefers the delivery time, falling back to creation time; "" if neither is set.
Widgets - Class in client.view
Reusable view fragments shared by multiple screen controllers.
Widgets() - Constructor for class client.view.Widgets
Non-instantiable: all members are static.
withClass(T, String) - Static method in class client.view.DashboardController
Adds a style class to a node and returns it (for inline use).
wrapLog(VBox) - Static method in class client.view.Widgets
Wraps the activity log in a scrollable pane.
writeLock - Variable in class server.net.ClientSession
Serializes outbound writes so frames ship atomically.
